name: Gume School Bus
recent_news: No public news; appears to be a single-operator owner-driver entity at a residential address in Houston (8406 Gulfwood Ln). Not to be confused with Flores US Bus Lines Inc, a separate Houston operator.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in candidate. Single-bus/owner-operator at residential address with ~$95K revenue; too small to be platform-relevant for Summit. Skip.

name: Magdalena School Bus LLC
recent_news: No public footprint. Registered at a residential address in Spring, TX (3910 Stone Rose Dr). No website, phone, or BBB/news mentions located.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in candidate. Micro single-vehicle LLC at residence; ~$94K revenue and 2 employees. No scalable district contract footprint. Skip.

name: John Champagne Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Churches, schools, scouts, and local organizations in the Signal Mountain/Chattanooga TN area (BBB profile)
recent_news: BBB profile (A+, not accredited) lists John Champagne Bus Service, LLC founded Nov 28, 2006 in Signal Mountain TN; primary model is charter trip rentals rather than dedicated district contracting.
fit_notes: Not a meaningful tuck-in. Charter-focused micro operator (~$88K revenue) without contracted school district routes; owner of retirement age suggests succession exposure but fleet/revenue too small for Summit platform addition. Skip.

name: Central Auto Buses Stockton
districts_or_customers: Greyhound and FlixBus ticket agent / intercity bus stop in downtown Stockton
recent_news: Central Autobuses at 401 S El Dorado St, Stockton operates as a Mexico-bound intercity bus ticket agency and Greyhound/FlixBus stop (Central de Autobuses), not as a school bus contractor. Distinct from Stockton USD Transportation.
fit_notes: DISQUALIFY. Not a student-transportation operator; it is an intercity bus ticket agency / Greyhound-FlixBus stop. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Angel Hector Sch Trnsprtn LLC
districts_or_customers: Likely Haverhill MA area; no confirmed district contract found. Haverhill Public Schools primarily uses NRT Bus and other established providers.
recent_news: No public news, website, or BBB record located. Registered at residential address (6 Princeton Pl, Haverhill MA).
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in candidate. Likely a single-van/SPED owner-operator subcontractor at residential address (~$86K revenue, 2 employees). Too small and no evidence of district prime contract. Skip.
